name: arkpad
description: A high-performance, modular rich text editor framework built on ProseMirror.
author: ArkCabin

scripts.build: npm run build -w @arkpad/core && npm run build -w @arkpad/extension-bold && npm run build -w @arkpad/extension-italic && npm run build -w @arkpad/extension-underline && npm run build -w @arkpad/extension-strike && npm run build -w @arkpad/extension-code && npm run build -w @arkpad/extension-link && npm run build -w @arkpad/extension-heading && npm run build -w @arkpad/extension-blockquote && npm run build -w @arkpad/extension-list-item && npm run build -w @arkpad/extension-bullet-list && npm run build -w @arkpad/extension-ordered-list && npm run build -w @arkpad/extension-horizontal-rule && npm run build -w @arkpad/extension-table && npm run build -w @arkpad/react && npm run build -w @arkpad/starter-kit && npm run build -w @arkpad/app
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @arkpad/core && npm run build -w @arkpad/react && npm run typecheck --workspaces
scripts.check: npm run build && npm run typecheck && npm run lint
